name: Chocolate Eclair Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package vanilla pudding mix, (6 oz) instant
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a 13 x 9 inch pan and cover the bottom with one layer of whole graham crackers.
2. Mix pudding mix and 3 cups milk in a bowl, beating well. Fold in whipped topping.
3. Spread half of the mixture over the graham crackers in the pan.
4. Cover with another layer of graham crackers.
5. Spread the remaining mixture over the graham crackers.
6. Top with another layer of graham crackers.
6. In a small saucepan, combine sugar, salt, cocoa, and 1/4 cup milk. Bring to a boil and continue boiling for one minute.
7. Remove from heat, add butter and vanilla extract. Beat until smooth and spread over the graham crackers.
8. Refrigerate the cake. It will be more delicious if served the next day.
